parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
[MOD-GF-MSG-1] Adds (or replaces) a GovernanceFrameworkDocument for a draft
version owned by an Ecosystem or a Corporation.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
[MOD-GF-MSG-2] Activates the next governance framework version for an
Ecosystem or Corporation owned by the signing corporation.

post.summary:
UpdateParams defines a (governance) operation for updating the module
parameters. The authority defaults to the x/gov module account.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: MsgUpdateParams is the Msg/UpdateParams request type.

operator.description: operator is the account authorized by corporation to run this Msg.

ecosystem_id.description:
ecosystem_id is optional. If set, the GF target is an Ecosystem owned by
`corporation`. If zero, the GF target is the signing Corporation's own CGF.

doc_language.description: doc_language is a BCP 47 language tag.

doc_url.description: doc_url is the URL where the document is published.

doc_digest_sri.description: doc_digest_sri is the SRI digest of the document.

version.description: version is the target governance framework version.

verana.gf.v1.MsgAddGovernanceFrameworkDo.description:
[MOD-GF-MSG-1] Adds (or replaces) a GovernanceFrameworkDocument for a draft
version owned by an Ecosystem or a Corporation.

operator.description: operator is the account authorized by corporation to run this Msg.

ecosystem_id.description:
ecosystem_id is optional. If set, target is the Ecosystem; otherwise the
signing Corporation's own CGF.

verana.gf.v1.MsgIncreaseActiveGovernance.description:
[MOD-GF-MSG-2] Activates the next governance framework version for an
Ecosystem or Corporation owned by the signing corporation.

authority.description: authority is the address that controls the module (defaults to x/gov).

params.description:
params defines the module parameters to update.
NOTE: All parameters must be supplied.

verana.gf.v1.MsgUpdateParams.description: MsgUpdateParams is the Msg/UpdateParams request type.

verana.gf.v1.Params.description:
Params defines the parameters for the x/gf module.
The module has no parameters at this time; the message is kept for forward compat
so that gov-proposed parameter changes can land without proto migrations.
